---
title: "Welcome to Intro to R Programming!"
---

<br>

## Course Information Summer 2025

**Meeting Time**: Tuesdays & Thursdays, 1:00–2:30 PM  

**Meeting Location**: Cobb Hall 319  

**Teaching Team**:  

- Instructor: Sabrina Nardin (she/her) – [nardin@uchicago.edu](mailto:nardin@uchicago.edu)  
- Teaching Assistant: Zach Meyer (he/him) – [zmeyer@uchicago.edu](mailto:zmeyer@uchicago.edu)


**Office Hours**:  

- Sabrina: Drop-in after class (2:30–3:30 PM, Cobb Hall 319). No appointment needed — bring questions about lecture, homework, or anything course-related.  
- Zach: Weekly drop-in (schedule TBD).


**Quick Links**:  

- [R Workbench](https://macss-r.uchicago.edu/)  
- [Canvas](#)  
- [Summer 2025 Course Schedule](#)
